prose:
**Furan frontier-orbital result** — Property: HOMO–LUMO gap from a DFT frontier-orbitals single-point calculation. Method used: chemkit `frontier-orbitals` task with DFT tier `standard`, explicitly `b3lyp/def2-tzvp` in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: fixed user-supplied XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz`; no geometry relaxation was reported for this task. Software/backend: PySCF; version was not reported by the tool. SCF converged: true, in 9 cycles.

Headline result: HOMO–LUMO gap = **6.2573602 eV**.

Orbital energies reported by the tool: HOMO = -6.3597638 eV; LUMO = -0.1024036 eV. The total electronic energy reported was -230.11429 hartree = -6261.7289 eV.

Warnings: no warning entries were returned in the tool result.

Integrity verdict from chemkit: `integrity.trustworthy = true`.

Reproducibility: chemkit CLI invocation reported by the tool was `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpti1f7wv3/live.json`. A live `.out` log path was not included in the returned result JSON, so I cannot report one without guessing.
